N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE LEON JR, TITO P. $24,999.99 PRINCIPAL, $2,825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $513.75 INTEREST, $442.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,781.24, SEE SCANNED DOC
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DE LEON JR, TITO P.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TITO DE LEON JR'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY AND ALSO THERE IS NO LEGAL BASIS TO SET ASIDE A JUDGMENT BASED ON ATTORNEY'S FAULT BECAUSE IT WAS FILED MORE THAN SIX MONTHS AFTER ENTRY OF THE JUDGMENT SOUGHT TO BE SET ASIDE. DEFENDANT'S EFFORT TO SEEK RELIEF UNDER SOME RULE OF LAW OTHER THAN CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 473(B) FAILS SINCE HIS NOTICE OF MOTION EXPRESSLY INVOKES THAT SUBSECTION AND NO OTHER LEGAL BASIS FOR THE RELIEF SOUGHT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077 =302/HEK

calendar.matters:
MOTION For Reliev From Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-13-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANA MEYERS OF THE REESE LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 1-858-550-0389 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. MATTHEW K. HIGBEE OF FIRST SOURCE, TEL. NO. (714) 617-8385 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TITO DE LEON JR'S MOTION For Relief From Default Judgment IS Denied. The motion is untimely and also there is no legal basis to set aside a judgment based on attorney's fault because it was filed more than six months after entry of the judgment sought to be set aside. Defendant's effort to seek relief under some rule of law other than Code of Civil Procedure 473(b) fails since his notice of motion expressly invokes that subsection and no other legal basis for the relief sought. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK

MOTION For Reliev From Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Continued To Dec-13-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANA MEYERS OF REESE LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. (858) 550-0389 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. CYNTHIA UNDERWOOD OF THE FIRST SOURCE LAW, TEL. NO. (714) 617-8385 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TITO DE LEON'S MOTION For Relief From Default Judgment IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 13, 2011. OPPOSITION PAPERS TO BE DELIVERED BY WAY OF E-MAIL TODAY. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK
